title: VIPSMP
description: Modpack for the SMP of the MARCUSK community members
body:
🌟 VIPSMP SMP Modpack
Welcome to the official modpack for the MARCUSK Community SMP 

This modpack is carefully curated for our server to enhance survival gameplay while staying close to the vanilla spirit. It includes essential quality-of-life mods, performance optimizations, and a few extra touches to spice things up without overwhelming the experience.
